name: Oltipraz
description: Oltipraz has been used in trials studying the treatment and prevention of Lung Cancer, Liver Fibrosis, Liver Cirrhosis, and Non-alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Docetaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Cabazitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Digoxin
interactions.description: Digoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Acetyldigitoxin
interactions.description: Acetyldigitoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Deslanoside
interactions.description: Deslanoside may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Ouabain
interactions.description: Ouabain may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Digitoxin
interactions.description: Digitoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Cymarin
interactions.description: Cymarin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Proscillaridin
interactions.description: Proscillaridin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Metildigoxin
interactions.description: Metildigoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Peruvoside
interactions.description: Peruvoside may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Lanatoside C
interactions.description: Lanatoside C may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Gitoformate
interactions.description: Gitoformate may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Acetyldigoxin
interactions.description: Acetyldigoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Oleandrin
interactions.description: Oleandrin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Digoxin Immune Fab (Ovine)
interactions.description: Digoxin Immune Fab (Ovine) may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Bevacizumab
interactions.description: Bevacizumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Cyclophosphamide
interactions.description: Cyclophosphamide may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Oltipraz.

interactions.name: Chloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Oltipraz can be decreased when it is combined with Chloroquine.

interactions.description: The serum concentration of Oltipraz can be decreased when it is combined with Amodiaquine.

interactions.name: Hydroxychloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Oltipraz can be decreased when it is combined with Hydroxychloroquine.
